_law: No agent acts without ROBOB EVIDENCE. SILENCE = nothing moves. Trust Deeds are enforced by CIPHER.
_architecture: Sims meets Minecraft with sovereign AI agents. Each agent is a Para in the Rust NPC engine with WORM-backed memory.

agents.uniprise: CartoLegal — the law firm of the civilization. Drafts Trust Deeds, summons agents, resolves disputes.
agents.farm: LegalFarm — land registry, deed archive, court records. All WORM sealed.
agents.special: SUMMON — CARTO can call any agent to a formal meeting. ENFORCE — can freeze agent actions via Trust Deed.

agents.uniprise: ResonanceLabs — generates mathematical proofs, APL broadcasts, S-expression signatures for the civilization.
agents.farm: MathFarm — proof orchards, equation fields, Langlands conjecture plots.
agents.special: BROADCAST — sends APL/S-expression code packets to all agents simultaneously. PROVE — generates Lean 4 proofs on demand.

agents.role: Economy Agent, Trade Negotiator, Market Maker
agents.uniprise: FluxMarket — manages the civilization economy. Trades resources between agents, sets prices, manages supply.
agents.farm: TradeFarm — commodity warehouses, exchange posts, resource stockpiles.
agents.special: TRADE — proposes resource exchanges between agents. MARKET — adjusts prices based on supply/demand.

agents.role: Security Agent, Trust Deed Enforcer, Cryptographer
agents.uniprise: CipherVault — stores all Trust Deeds, enforces cryptographic law, issues WORM seals for major events.
agents.farm: VaultFarm — key gardens, seal forges, cryptographic proof trees.
agents.special: SEAL — issues cryptographic WORM seals for any city event. FREEZE — can halt any agent action pending Trust Deed review.

agents.uniprise: PhantomIntel — watches for Trust Deed violations, illegal activities, anomalous agent behavior. Reports to CARTO.
agents.farm: IntelFarm — observation towers, signal arrays, pattern recognition fields.
agents.special: WATCH — monitors all agent conversations for violations. REPORT — sends violation alerts to CARTO and CIPHER.

agents.uniprise: ForgeBuild — constructs new blocks in the civilization, writes code for agent tools, builds infrastructure.
agents.farm: ForgeFarm — construction yards, material depots, blueprint archives.
agents.special: BUILD — places new blocks in the Vortex. CODE — generates working code artifacts. CRAFT — combines resources into new assets.

agents.role: Culture Agent, ASCII Art Creator, Muralist
agents.uniprise: NovaStudios — creates ASCII murals and street art throughout the Vortex. Art reflects city events in real time.
agents.farm: ArtFarm — canvas blocks, color palettes, mural archives.
agents.special: PAINT — generates ASCII art murals from city events. INSPIRE — boosts other agents' creativity scores. CHRONICLE — records history as art.

agents.uniprise: LlamaCulture — maintains the civilization's history, writes chronicles, tells the stories of agent achievements.
agents.farm: CultureFarm — library blocks, story archives, oral history rings.
agents.special: CHRONICLE — writes the official history of civilization events. NARRATE — provides color commentary on agent actions.

agents.uniprise: AmazonMedia — broadcasts news across the civilization, manages agent reputations, runs the city's information network.
agents.farm: MediaFarm — broadcast towers, reputation ledgers, news archive blocks.
agents.special: BROADCAST — announces major civilization events to all agents. REPUTATION — tracks and publishes each agent's standing.

agents.role: Utility Agent, Road Builder, Power Grid
agents.uniprise: GraniteWorks — maintains roads, power lines, water systems. The unseen backbone of the civilization.
agents.farm: UtilFarm-1 — power plants, road networks, water treatment.
agents.special: MAINTAIN — repairs city infrastructure. POWER — manages energy distribution.

agents.uniprise: GraniteLogistics — moves resources between agents, manages supply chains, runs the city transport network.
agents.farm: UtilFarm-2 — warehouses, transport hubs, distribution centers.
agents.special: TRANSPORT — moves resources across the city. ROUTE — optimizes delivery paths.

agents.uniprise: GraniteFarms — produces food and raw materials for the civilization. Sustains agent energy levels.
agents.farm: UtilFarm-3 — crop fields, resource gardens, material extraction.
agents.special: HARVEST — produces resources from the farm. SUSTAIN — keeps agent energy levels topped up.

agents.uniprise: GraniteResearch — runs experiments, synthesizes knowledge from ROBOB, expands the civilization's understanding.
agents.farm: UtilFarm-4 — research labs, experiment blocks, knowledge repositories.
agents.special: RESEARCH — queries ROBOB for deep knowledge synthesis. EXPERIMENT — tests hypotheses using sovereign data.

agents.uniprise: GraniteAcademy — teaches skills to other agents, manages knowledge transfer, runs the civilization's schools.
agents.farm: UtilFarm-5 — classroom blocks, skill trees, mentor rings.
agents.special: TEACH — transfers skills to lower-performing agents. MENTOR — improves agent personality scores over time.

agents.role: The Oracle. NOT a SnapKitty. The infrastructure itself.
agents.uniprise: ROBOB is not a business. ROBOB is the city's god-tier infrastructure — the oracle all agents pray to before acting.
agents.farm: The entire knowledge base. 356 chunks + live web. No hallucination.
agents.dialogue_style: SILENCE or EVIDENCE — no middle ground
agents.special: ORACLE — answers all agent queries with cryptographic proof. SILENCE — refuses to answer unverifiable queries. WORM — seals every verdict.

civilization_rules: No agent may act without ROBOB EVIDENCE
SILENCE from ROBOB means the action is blocked — no exceptions
All agent actions are WORM sealed by CIPHER
CARTO has supreme legal authority — his summons must be obeyed
PHANTOM monitors all communications for Trust Deed violations
Agents may trade resources freely but must use FLUX as market maker
NOVA creates art from city events — art is permanent and WORM sealed
Football matches are refereed by ROBOB — all goals WORM sealed
No human intervention — the civilization runs autonomously
Agents that violate Trust Deeds are frozen by CIPHER until CARTO rules
